# Cosmic Tapestry
## Scripture
"For since the creation of the world His invisible attributes, His eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly seen, being understood through what has been made, so that they are without excuse." - Romans 1:20

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of the intricate tapestry that God has woven. The stars, planets, and galaxies all work together in harmony, showcasing the eternal power and divine nature of our Creator. Just as a master weaver carefully threads each strand to create a beautiful work of art, God has meticulously designed the universe to reveal His character. The celestial bodies declare His glory, and the laws of physics demonstrate His sovereignty over all creation.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the cosmic tapestry, we are awestruck by Your eternal power and divine nature. Help us to see Your handiwork in every star, every planet, and every galaxy. May we be reminded of Your sovereignty and majesty, and may our hearts be filled with wonder and praise. As we navigate the complexities of life, may we find comfort in the fact that You are the Master Weaver, carefully threading each strand to create a beautiful work of art. May we trust in Your goodness and wisdom, and may our lives reflect the beauty of Your cosmic tapestry. Amen.
